rulings.Case Title: LINDA STEINOFF HOLMES VS. DANIEL FELDMAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Respond To Discovery Mtc.Form.Rogs.Pod.Feldman Cud-19-666401
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Jul 22, 2020 line 8. DEFENDANT DANIEL FELDMAN's Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Respond To Discovery Hearing Required. By no later than 8:30 a.m. parties to start a meet and confer conference over phone/video (preferred) or in-person if both parties prefer a conference in-person and agree on a location. By 9:30 a.m. parties to notify the Court of their progress. = (501/CFH)
